Video.summary: Marketing executives Kristen and Dave bought their modest first home a few years ago and undertook the much-needed renovations themselves. They did a great job removing walls and installing a new kitchen but then ran out of steam. Now they need designer Samantha Pynn's expertise to pull their open concept kitchen/dining/living room together and turn it into the beautiful modern space that they had originally envisioned.
Video.title: Pure Design: Kristen & Dave's Main Floor

Image.alt: Pure Design: Kristen & Dave's Main Floor
Pure Design: Kristen & Dave's Main Floor

Video.summary: Watch this DIY video tutorial to learn How to make a Spring Wreath. Adding colorful spring wreaths to your home is a fabulous way to make your space blossom with very little effort. Follow along with this home decor craft tutorial to create a stunning and bright project. This DIY craft is easy to make, and you can use just about any fabric you would like. Get started on your own DIY wreath for the most cheerful of seasons!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath
FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath

Video.summary: Ready to start making perfect flower stems and friendship bracelets? This How to Use the Sizzix Twist and Style Tool guide shows you just how easy using this tool is. Plus, this is a great tool you can use for all different kinds of crafts that require a little extra twist. Whether you are making flowers and need a stem, or you are working with wire on some DIY jewelry projects, this tool can become your go to! This Sizzix tool is worth giving a try if you want to expand your craft tools collection!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: How to Use the Sizzix Twist and Style Tool

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: How to Use the Sizzix Twist and Style Tool
FaveCrafts: How to Use the Sizzix Twist and Style Tool

Video.summary: While picking out the perfect gift for dad can be tempting, sometimes a gift card is an even better idea. As they say, it is the thought that counts! With this Toolbox Fathers Day Craft, you can learn how to make the perfect gift for dad. By creating a DIY craft to keep the gift card tucked into, you give your dad some handmade love and something useful at the same time. Plus, you could easily use this homemade box to wrap up some homemade candies, as well.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Toolbox Father's Day Craft

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Toolbox Father's Day Craft
FaveCrafts: Toolbox Father's Day Craft

Video.summary: Have you always wanted to learn how to Crochet? Well now's your chance to have a lesson in the comfort of your own home. This easy to follow step by step programme will teach you the basics to get started and then move you onb to some simple projects such as making bunting and a crochet basket. You will find out what equipment you'll need, learn different crochet stitches and look at finishing techniques.
Video.title: Learn to Crochet

Image.alt: Learn to Crochet
Learn to Crochet

Video.summary: Learn to crochet with Marcy and our special guest Al Paca!
Video.title: The Art of Crochet for Kids: Learn to Crochet Al Paca

Image.alt: The Art of Crochet for Kids: Learn to Crochet Al Paca
The Art of Crochet for Kids: Learn to Crochet Al Paca
